tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "UbuntuComputer"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall addrgrp
edit "Allowed-Egress-Destinations"
set member "all"
next
end
config firewall service custom
edit "HTTPS-8443"
set tcp-portrange 8443
next
edit "HTTPS-443"
set tcp-portrange 443
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Allow-Ubuntu-Required-Egress"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTPS-443" "HTTPS-8443"
set nat enable
next
edit 0
set name "Deny-Ubuntu-Arbitrary-Egress"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set nat disable
next
end
diagnose firewall iprope list | grep -n "UbuntuComputer""}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
    edit "port3"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 3
next
    edit "port4"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 4
    next
    edit "port5"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 5
    next
    edit "port6"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 6
    next
    edit "port7"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 7
    next
    edit "port8"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
set snmp-index 8
    next
    edit "port9"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 9
    next
    edit "port10"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 10
    next
    edit "naf.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set src-check disable
        set snmp-index 11
    next
    edit "l2t.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set snmp-index 12
    next
    edit "ssl.root"
set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set alias "SSL VPN interface"
        set snmp-index 13
    next
    edit "fortilink"
        set vdom "root"
        set fortilink enable
        set ip 10.255.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set snmp-index 14
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"

        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"

end
